'''鈭歞h-k-sh''' ('''dhakasha''') is an [[Aelaki]] [[Verbs|stative verb]] meaning "[[Wikt:hindre|hindre]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| dh-k-sh
|-
! Word class
| [[Stative verb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:hindre|hindre]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| 鈭歞h-k-sh
|-
! Lemma
| dhakasha
|}

== [[Patient]] agreement paradigm ==
''Base present, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakashithi|dhakashithi]] || [[word:dhakashiji|dhakashiji]] || [[word:dhakashishi|dhakashishi]] || [[word:dhakashi|dhakashi]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakashuthuth|dhakashuthuth]] || [[word:dhakashujuj|dhakashujuj]] || [[word:dhakashushush|dhakashushush]] || [[word:dhakash|dhakash]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakashuthu|dhakashuthu]] || [[word:dhakashuju|dhakashuju]] || [[word:dhakashushu|dhakashushu]] || [[word:dhakashu|dhakashu]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakashufuth|dhakashufuth]] || [[word:dhakashufuj|dhakashufuj]] || [[word:dhakashufush|dhakashufush]] || [[word:dhakashuf|dhakashuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakashethe|dhakashethe]] || [[word:dhakasheje|dhakasheje]] || [[word:dhakasheshe|dhakasheshe]] || [[word:dhakashe|dhakashe]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakashothoth|dhakashothoth]] || [[word:dhakashojoj|dhakashojoj]] || [[word:dhakashoshosh|dhakashoshosh]] || [[word:dhakash|dhakash]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakashotho|dhakashotho]] || [[word:dhakashojo|dhakashojo]] || [[word:dhakashosho|dhakashosho]] || [[word:dhakasho|dhakasho]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakashofoth|dhakashofoth]] || [[word:dhakashofoj|dhakashofoj]] || [[word:dhakashofosh|dhakashofosh]] || [[word:dhakashof|dhakashof]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:dhakash忙th忙|dhakash忙th忙]] || [[word:dhakash忙j忙|dhakash忙j忙]] || [[word:dhakash忙sh忙|dhakash忙sh忙]] || [[word:dhakash忙|dhakash忙]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:dhakashathath|dhakashathath]] || [[word:dhakashajaj|dhakashajaj]] || [[word:dhakashashash|dhakashashash]] || [[word:dhakash|dhakash]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:dhakashatha|dhakashatha]] || [[word:dhakashaja|dhakashaja]] || [[word:dhakashasha|dhakashasha]] || [[word:dhakasha|dhakasha]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:dhakashafath|dhakashafath]] || [[word:dhakashafaj|dhakashafaj]] || [[word:dhakashafash|dhakashafash]] || [[word:dhakashaf|dhakashaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[stative]].none || [[word:dhakashasha|dhakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].none || [[word:godhakashasha|godhakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].none || [[word:gokidhakashasha|gokidhakashasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]] || [[word:dhakashn眉sha|dhakashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]] || [[word:godhakashnkn眉sha|godhakashnkn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakashn眉sha|gokidhakashn眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dhakash毛sha|dhakash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godhakashnksh毛sha|godhakashnksh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidhakash毛sha|gokidhakash毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakashrosha|dhakashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakashnkrosha|godhakashnkrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakashrosha|gokidhakashrosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakashmusha|dhakashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakashnkmusha|godhakashnkmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakashmusha|gokidhakashmusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[mythical]] || [[word:dhakasherasha|dhakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:godhakashnksherasha|godhakashnksherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[mythical]] || [[word:gokidhakasherasha|gokidhakasherasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[intention]] || [[word:dhakashngasha|dhakashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[intention]] || [[word:godhakashnkngasha|godhakashnkngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[intention]] || [[word:gokidhakashngasha|gokidhakashngasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[optative]] || [[word:dhakashyasha|dhakashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[optative]] || [[word:godhakashnkyasha|godhakashnkyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[optative]] || [[word:gokidhakashyasha|gokidhakashyasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:dhakashyamasha|dhakashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:godhakashnkyamasha|godhakashnkyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[deliberative]] || [[word:gokidhakashyamasha|gokidhakashyamasha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakashn眉sh毛sha|dhakashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakashnkn眉sh毛sha|godhakashnkn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakashn眉sh毛sha|gokidhakashn眉sh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakashn眉rosha|dhakashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakashnkn眉rosha|godhakashnkn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakashn眉rosha|gokidhakashn眉rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakashn眉musha|dhakashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakashnkn眉musha|godhakashnkn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[present]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakashn眉musha|gokidhakashn眉musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakash毛n眉sha|dhakash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakashnksh毛n眉sha|godhakashnksh毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakash毛n眉sha|gokidhakash毛n眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakash毛rosha|dhakash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakashnksh毛rosha|godhakashnksh毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakash毛rosha|gokidhakash毛rosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakash毛musha|dhakash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakashnksh毛musha|godhakashnksh毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakash毛musha|gokidhakash毛musha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakashron眉sha|dhakashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakashnkron眉sha|godhakashnkron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakashron眉sha|gokidhakashron眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakashrosh毛sha|dhakashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakashnkrosh毛sha|godhakashnkrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakashrosh毛sha|gokidhakashrosh毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dhakashromusha|dhakashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godhakashnkromusha|godhakashnkromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[hearsay]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidhakashromusha|gokidhakashromusha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:dhakashmun眉sha|dhakashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:godhakashnkmun眉sha|godhakashnkmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[present]] || [[word:gokidhakashmun眉sha|gokidhakashmun眉sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:dhakashmush毛sha|dhakashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:godhakashnkmush毛sha|godhakashnkmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[past]] || [[word:gokidhakashmush毛sha|gokidhakashmush毛sha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:dhakashmurosha|dhakashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hodiernal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:godhakashnkmurosha|godhakashnkmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]].[[hesternal]].[[inferential]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gokidhakashmurosha|gokidhakashmurosha]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none || [[word:dhakash|dhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.none_[[gnomic]] || [[word:dh忙k忙sh|dh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]] || [[word:hodhakash|hodhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:hodh忙k忙sh|hodh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodhakash|hohodhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[probable]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:hohodh忙k忙sh|hohodh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]] || [[word:n眉dhakash|n眉dhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n眉dh忙k忙sh|n眉dh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dhakash|n眉n眉dhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[inchoative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n眉n眉dh忙k忙sh|n眉n眉dh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]] || [[word:n茂dhakash|n茂dhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:n茂dh忙k忙sh|n茂dh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dhakash|n茂n茂dhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[cessative]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:n茂n茂dh忙k忙sh|n茂n茂dh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]] || [[word:ludhakash|ludhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:ludh忙k忙sh|ludh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludhakash|luludhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[resumptive]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:luludh忙k忙sh|luludh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]] || [[word:lidhakash|lidhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:lidh忙k忙sh|lidh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidhakash|lilidhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[repetitive]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:lilidh忙k忙sh|lilidh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]] || [[word:kodhakash|kodhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kodh忙k忙sh|kodh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodhakash|kokodhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kokodh忙k忙sh|kokodh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]] || [[word:kedhakash|kedhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]] || [[word:kedh忙k忙sh|kedh忙k忙sh]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedhakash|kekedhakash]]
|-
| [[stative]]_prefix.[[almost]]_[[cess]]_[[gnomic]]_[[continuous]] || [[word:kekedh忙k忙sh|kekedh忙k忙sh]]
|}

''93 forms generated.''

== See also ==
